-  FFCAP_ET_INERTIA 

Global Variable# FFCAP_ET_INERTIA

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFCAP_ET_INERTIA: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffcap_et_inertia#Discussion)

The effect represents a inertia force effect.
